_comment: Real values from FINRA's monthly Margin Statistics (Debit Balances in Customers' Securities Margin Accounts). Source: https://www.finra.org/rules-guidance/key-topics/margin-accounts/margin-statistics — FINRA publishes around the 3rd week of the month for the prior month. Source values are in $ millions; converted to $ billions here for display. Append a new entry each month.
